_meta.source: 衛生福利部國民健康署 (Taiwan Ministry of Health and Welfare — Health Promotion Administration)
_meta.note: Taiwan BMI standards differ from WHO global standards due to Asian body composition research showing higher cardiometabolic risk at lower BMI values.

adult_standard.description: Standard BMI classification for Taiwanese adults (18–64 years)

elderly_standard.description: Modified BMI standard for adults aged 65 and above. Higher range recommended due to increased sarcopenia risk at lower weights.
elderly_standard.note: 台灣老人健康促進計畫建議 65 歲以上成人 BMI 目標為 22–26.9
elderly_standard.source: 台灣老人健康促進計畫 — 衛生福利部

children_standard.description: BMI for children and adolescents uses age- and sex-specific percentile charts, not fixed cutoffs.
children_standard.note: See 台灣兒童及青少年 BMI 百分位圖 (HPA, 2013)

comparison_who_global.note: WHO global adult cutoffs for comparison

waist_circumference_thresholds.description: 腰圍風險切點 — Taiwan HPA abdominal obesity thresholds

male.note: 男性腰圍 ≥90cm 為腹部肥胖

female.note: 女性腰圍 ≥80cm 為腹部肥胖

waist_circumference_thresholds.source: WHO WPR / Taiwan HPA harmonized standard
